articles.excerpt: In this latest Top 40 list, Cooper dives into the most popular commanders on EDHREC that you can play for just two mana.
What are the most popular monocolored commanders of all time? Let's look at the 40 most played, according to EDHREC.

container.description: Popular decks and cards for Light-Paws, Emperor's Voice
container.title: Light-Paws, Emperor's Voice (Commander) - Optimized
